ticket.subject: Give Multi Carrier Shipping Label App another try? We can extend the free trial.
ticket.raw_subject: Give Multi Carrier Shipping Label App another try? We can extend the free trial.
ticket.description:
Hello Auravedic,

 We regret that you had to uninstall our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** from auravedic-22.myshopify.com

 If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you. Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.


> **Did you know?**
>
> - _Our shipping app is certified by top shipping carriers like UPS, FedEx, USPS, Stamps.com, DHL Express, Australia Post, Canada Post, Post Nord & many more._
> - _This app will allow you to ship with multiple carrier(s)._
> - _Print 100 (s) of shipping labels in a single click._
> - _Our shipping experts will provide you with quick and reliable support._



 Let’s schedule a quick call to discuss how exactly we can help you reach your shipping requirements.

 We would like to hear from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

        If you have faced any difficulties with the app, we can hop on a call to assist you.
        Or if you are awaiting your store launch, do let us know so we can extend your free trial period.
        

        

         Did you know?
